creator: cy@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to amendlik from comment #56)

Sadly openssh-portable-gssapi is broken because it requires an extra patch which I think comes from Debian, see the Makefile. Having said that, I don't see why it needs the extra gssapi patch. I think it should work without the extra gssapi patch. But since I'm not MAINTAINER=, I will need to discuss with the ports MAINTAINER. Testing it without the gssapi extra patch is on my list of things to do. After that I will ask the MAINTAINER through phabricator if we can commit it.
